name: Control Flow and Artifacts
intent: Add conditional execution, gate/transform/loop step types, and persistent artifact files written to user-defined paths after workflow completion.

success_criteria.criterion: when: conditionals skip steps based on truthy/falsy evaluation
gate steps run shell commands and control flow via onPass/onFail
transform steps map data without LLM invocation
loop steps retry with accumulated evidence
Artifacts written to workflow output directory after completion
latest overwrite pattern and runId-stamped history work

specs.name: Phase 2 Foundation
specs.intent: Prepare codebase for control flow additions

specs.name: When, Gate, Transform
specs.intent: Add conditional execution and non-LLM step types

specs.name: Loop Steps
specs.intent: Add retry loops with accumulated evidence from prior attempts
acceptance_criteria: Prior attempt results available in scope

specs.name: Artifacts and Polish
specs.intent: Persistent artifact files at user-defined paths
